description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the maven:3.5.3-jdk-8 Docker image. Define variables MAVEN_CLI_OPTS set to "-s ci_settings.xml --batch-mode" and MAVEN_OPTS set to "-Dmaven.repo.local=.m2/repository". Set up three stages: build, test, deploy, and cache the .m2/repository/ and target/ directories. Add a build job in the build stage that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS compile". Add a test job in the test stage that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS test". Add a deploy job in the deploy stage that runs "mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy" and is limited to the master branch.
